name: claude-code-forge
description: A curated collection of plugins for Claude Code, enhancing your AI-powered development workflow.

plugins.name: pdforge
plugins.description: Product Development Forge - AI-driven 7-phase product development workflow. Provides complete methodology from requirements analysis to deployment, including brainstorming, TDD, three-stage review, and auto-fix loops.

plugins.name: adversarial-debugger
plugins.description: Adversarial Debugging with Agent Teams - Multiple agents investigate competing hypotheses in parallel, challenge each other's findings through structured debate, and converge on the true root cause.

plugins.name: design-clone
plugins.description: Design DNA extraction + pixel-perfect website cloning. Combines programmatic CSS extraction (Browser MCP + getComputedStyle) with a 3-dimension design profile schema (design system / design style / visual effects). Two modes: --dna-only outputs a structured 150+ field Design DNA JSON; --full additionally generates a Next.js pixel-perfect clone via parallel builder agents.

plugins.name: forge-teams
plugins.description: Agent Teams Product Development Pipeline - 7-phase adversarial collaborative development with multi-agent debate, competition, and cross-validation at every critical decision point, including red team attacks, adversarial debugging, self-healing parallel implementation, independent bug fix loop (/forge-fix), and requirement verification (/forge-verify).

plugins.name: persona-distill
plugins.description: Persona Distillation Ecosystem - parameterized schema library + generation/evaluation/scheduling/debate toolkit for distilling personas (people or rule systems) into self-contained Claude Code skills. 5 skills (distill-meta, persona-judge, distill-collector, persona-router, persona-debate), 9 persona schemas (self/collaborator/mentor/loved-one/friend/public-mirror/public-domain/topic/executor), 18 reusable components, 12-dimension quality rubric, multi-round Phase 2.5, auto conflict detection, runnable parsers, migration tool, community schema extension.

plugins.name: skill-evolve
plugins.description: Skill Evolution Engine — Darwin-style autonomous SKILL.md optimizer. Applies an 8-dimension rubric (60 structural + 40 effectiveness), independent-subagent scoring, and git-backed ratchet hill-climbing (keep-or-revert) to evolve any Claude Code skill from initial draft toward 90+. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch and alchaincyf/darwin-skill.
